calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Dipak Patel is present and in pro per.
Defendant Oscar Menjivar is present.
Attorney Nelsonya Causby representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Conroy, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-07-2011 is vacated.
